title: Amendment of 8(1) committee constituted under the Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) Act, 1959 (57 of 1959)

 ֚ ե . 1268] ֊ժᳰֈ᭨֔֠ ֎֡ ։֗֞֒ ֐֞ ռᭅ 13, 2024֍֞ ᭨չ֡֊23, 1945  No. 1268] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, MARCH 13, 2024/PHALGUNA 23, 1945 सी.जी.-डी.एल.-अ.-14032024-253017 CG-DL-E-14032024-253017 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF STATISTICS AND PROGRAMME IMPLEMENTATION NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th, March, 2024 S.O. 1333(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 8 of the Indian Statistical Institute Act (ISI), 1959 (57 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment to the notification of the Central Government number S.O. 4252(E) dated 26th September, 2023 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) dated the 27th September, 2023 constituting a Committee under Sub-Section (1) of Section 8 of the ISI Act, 1959, namely – In the said notification, for serial no.1 of paragraph 1 thereof, the following shall be substituted :- 1. Ms. Puja Singh Mandol , Additional Secretary, - Chairperson Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation(MoSPI) [F. No. I-12011/16/2013-ISI] CHANDRADEEP KUMAR JHA, Dy Director General Note : The principal notification was published on 27th September, 2023 vide number S.O. 4252(E). Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. AMIT KUMAR JAISWAL Digitally signed by AMIT KUMAR JAISWAL Date: 2024.03.14 23:59:24 +05'30' -- 2 of 2 --
